Read Research Get an Audit
Free Tools

See your numbers.
Find the leaks.

Five calculators and audits built specifically for HVAC, roofing, and plumbing companies. Put in your real numbers and see exactly where money is slipping through. Most owners find $50K–$200K in fixable leaks on the first pass.

Results show instantly - email required only for the full detailed report
All 5 Tools
📊
Free Tool 01 of 05
Marketing Cost Calculator
What does a booked job actually cost you?

Put in your monthly ad spend, how many calls you get, your close rate, and your average ticket. See your real cost per booked job - and whether it's in line with the top 25% of companies in your trade.

Cost per booked jobIndustry benchmarksROI by channel
Calculate your numbers
📞
Free Tool 02 of 05
Phone Revenue Calculator
How much is slipping through every time the phone rings?

How many calls are you missing every month? Put in your call volume and answer rate. We'll show you the dollar amount walking out the door - and what happens if you get your answer rate to 90%.

Monthly revenue lostRecovery projectionAnswer rate benchmark
See your lost revenue
🎯
Free Tool 03 of 05
Lead Source Grader
Which channels deserve more budget - and which ones are draining it?

Google Ads, LSAs, Angi, Thumbtack, referrals, door knocking - select what you're running and get a straight A–D grade on each one. Keep it, fix it, or cut it.

A–D grade per channelKeep/Fix/Cut verdictBudget reallocation guide
Grade your lead sources
🔍
Free Tool 04 of 05
Website Conversion Audit
Would a homeowner actually call after visiting your site?

Enter your website URL. We pull your real PageSpeed score and check whether your phone number is prominent, your CTAs are clear, and your site would make a homeowner call. Takes 30 seconds.

PageSpeed scoreConversion leak scoreMobile performance
Audit your website
📋
Free Tool 05 of 05
Capacity-to-Demand Planner
"How much should I spend on marketing?" is the wrong question.

The right question is: how many jobs can my team actually handle? Enter how many techs you have and how many jobs they can run per day - and we'll tell you exactly how many calls you actually need.

Jobs capacity per monthLeads neededMax marketing spend
Plan your capacity
Want the full picture?

See everything in one audit.

The free tools show individual leaks. The Revenue Leak Audit covers everything - your full marketing system, competitive benchmarks, phone performance, and website - with every finding shown in annual dollars.

Get a Revenue Leak Audit ($750)
Built on Tenth

Revenue intelligence for home service companies. We study how the most profitable HVAC, roofing, and plumbing businesses grow. We share everything we find.
